name: brave-search
why: Widely used search integration with strong maintenance cadence.
evaluationNotes: Package verified at @brave/brave-search-mcp-server@2.0.80. It requires --brave-api-key; missing keys fail at startup cleanly and should remain credential-gated.

name: git
why: Common local repository workflow surface for status, diff, branch, and commit operations.
evaluationNotes: Verified on Windows through MCPace with uvx mcp-server-git against a temporary initialized git repository; git_status requires repo_path and fails cleanly without it.

name: github
why: Very common hosted repository and issue workflow surface.
evaluationNotes: Verified package @modelcontextprotocol/server-github@2025.4.8: probe listed 26 tools and search_repositories worked; private/write operations still need a real GitHub token profile.

name: notion
why: Popular workspace/documentation integration for knowledge-base and project-management workflows.
evaluationNotes: Verified package @notionhq/notion-mcp-server@2.2.1: probe listed 22 tools; search call returned Notion 401 with empty/invalid token, so enable only with NOTION_TOKEN or OPENAPI_MCP_HEADERS.

name: pdf
why: Popular local-doc workflow with low risk when constrained to project paths.
evaluationNotes: Current @modelcontextprotocol/server-pdf candidate did not complete stdio initialize in local smoke and left an HTTP-like helper; keep disabled until the correct transport/options are proven.

name: playwright
why: Popular browser automation MCP for headless isolated browser checks; useful as an optional alternative to the host-visible ABP browser.
evaluationNotes: Verified on Windows through MCPace with @playwright/mcp@0.0.70 --headless --isolated: probe listed 21 tools and browser_navigate/browser_snapshot/browser_close succeeded.

name: redis
why: Popular infrastructure primitive. Good fit for cache, memory, queue, and vector workflows.
evaluationNotes: Best as optional credential-scoped or env-scoped shared runtime.

name: slack
why: Very common collaboration surface for agents and team workflows.
evaluationNotes: Need clear read/write boundary and token profile model.

name: sqlite
why: Simple local database path. Good proving ground for project-local database tooling.
evaluationNotes: Verified on Windows through MCPace upstream_probe and real create_table/write_query/read_query calls via uvx mcp-server-sqlite. Use a parent directory that already exists.

name: time
why: Safe baseline utility server from official reference set; useful for deterministic timezone/date tasks.
evaluationNotes: Verified on Windows through MCPace upstream_probe and real calls get_current_time/convert_time via uvx mcp-server-time.

name: everything
why: Canonical protocol surface test server from MCP maintainers; useful for compatibility smoke checks.
evaluationNotes: Verified on Windows through @modelcontextprotocol/server-everything@2026.1.26 with upstream_probe and echo. Use in dev/labs profile only; not intended for production workloads.

name: google-drive-sheets
why: Common knowledge and document surface for end-user automation.
evaluationNotes: Need strict OAuth profile model and doc-scoping rules.

name: postgres
why: Very common production database target for read-only or analyst workflows.
evaluationNotes: Prefer read-only mode first. Need explicit connection-profile handling.
